notes: Primary sources used: Sharp USA ME651-AVT3 product page (proav.sharpusa.com), Sharp Display Solutions EU datasheet (sharpdisplays.eu/p/datasheet/en/datasheet/rp/me651.xhtml), and the NEC MultiSync ME651 user manual via ManualsLib. HDMI 2.0 grade confirmed via Ampronix and search-result snippets referencing HDCP 1.4/2.2; DisplayPort 1.2 inferred from search snippets referencing HDCP 1.3/2.2 and 4K60 support. RS-232C presence confirmed by the AVT3 variant page and user manual; 9-pin D-sub connector type inferred from the sibling M651-2 model manual (same product family). IEC C13 power inlet inferred from class of device (large-format commercial display with supplied power cord); exact IEC connector sub-type not stated in any retrieved source. LAN speed confirmed as 100Mbit from EU datasheet and AVT3 page. HDMI count is 2 per all official Sharp sources; a third-party listing (Ampronix) claimed 3x HDMI 2.0 but this was not corroborated. Audio IN connector presence confirmed from AVT3 page; EU datasheet only explicitly listed audio output. The ME651 is the base variant; ME651-IR, ME651-PT, ME651-MPi4, ME651-AVT3 are variant SKUs with added options (IR touch, PCAP touch, Raspberry Pi CM4, AVerMedia tuner).

ports.name: HDMI 1 (ARC)
ports.note: HDMI 1 also supports ARC (Audio Return Channel) output; HDCP 1.4/2.2

ports.name: Audio IN
ports.note: Stereo analog audio input (3.5mm mini jack)

ports.name: Audio OUT
ports.note: Stereo analog audio output (3.5mm mini jack); carries audio from DisplayPort and HDMI sources

ports.name: Remote
ports.note: 3.5mm jack for wired remote control / external IR sensor unit

ports.name: LAN
ports.note: 10BASE-T/100BASE-TX; used for network control and management

ports.name: USB
ports.note: USB 2.0 Type-A; MediaPlayer input and firmware update

ports.name: USB (Powered)
ports.note: USB Type-A power output, 10W; for powering connected devices

ports.name: AC IN
ports.note: IEC C13/C14 inlet; internal power supply 100-240V AC 50/60Hz; supplied with power cord
